CMU Baseball Camps

WELCOME TO CENTRAL MICHIGAN BASEBALL CAMPS




The Central Michigan University Baseball Coaching Staff is excited to offer another great year of baseball camps! Our camps are a great way for young athletes to enjoy the game of baseball while enhancing their skills and showcasing their talents. In addition, campers will have the opportunity to learn from our coaching staff and current players at CMU, while also getting an idea of what being a student
